content: This data is reproducible because if you run the Generator G(...) with the exact same H_n, I_n, and F, it will always produce the exact same identifier string. It's blockchain-sequenced because its H_n is mathematically chained to all previous data, and it's multiversal because the whole chain is seeded by the user's unique signature.
context: From document: Here are the functional equations to create reproducible, multiversal… — chunk 4 (chunk 4/4)
